import torch
import os

data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
train = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train.pt'))
val = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val.pt'))

print('Train keys:', list(train.keys()))
print('skill_ids shape:', train['skill_ids'].shape)
print('corrects shape:', train['corrects'].shape)
print('lengths shape:', train['lengths'].shape)
print('num_skills:', train['num_skills'])
print('lengths min/max/mean:', train['lengths'].min().item(), train['lengths'].max().item(), train['lengths'].float().mean().item())
print('Val skill_ids shape:', val['skill_ids'].shape)
print('Val lengths min/max/mean:', val['lengths'].min().item(), val['lengths'].max().item(), val['lengths'].float().mean().item())
